rows.label: qev050201_MSG0001
rows.name:
Ah... Nee-sama has left...
How utterly powerless I am...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050201_MSG0002
rows.name:
—Uh, excuse me? Are you...
Are you perhaps a member of BLADE?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050201_MSG0003
rows.name:
My very existence is a disgrace to my family.
Please... do not look at me...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050201_JNK0010
rows.name: Stare

rows.label: qev050201_SEL0011
rows.name: Intentionally stare at him.

rows.label: qev050201_JNK0020
rows.name: Question

rows.label: qev050201_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask him in detail why he is so depressed.

rows.label: qev050201_MSG0004
rows.name: Wh-Why are you staring at me like that?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050201_MSG0005
rows.name:
Hah...!?
Are you telling me not to run away?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050201_MSG0006
rows.name:
You are absolutely right.
No matter how powerless and disgraceful I may be,
I must uphold the dying wish of my brothers![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050201_MSG0007
rows.name:
I beg of you, good sir! Please, could you
bring my Nee-sama back for me?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050201_MSG0008
rows.name:
I really shouldn't be speaking to an outsider
like you about such matters...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050201_MSG0009
rows.name:
...No, this is no time to be clinging
to appearances...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050201_MSG0010
rows.name:
Good sir... I hear that all of you in BLADE
are exceptional warriors.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050201_MSG0011
rows.name:
I beg of you... Please, could you
bring my Nee-sama back for me?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050201_MSG0012
rows.name:
Nee-sama—my older sister, Zo Zazhi—ran off
from NLA on her own to hunt down the Growth assassin
who murdered our brothers.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050201_MSG0013
rows.name:
True, my Nee-sama is strong. Even among Larsians,
there are few who could match her in combat.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050201_MSG0014
rows.name:
But that assassin is a terrifying murderer
whose strength surpasses even hers.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050201_JNK0030
rows.name: Inquire

rows.label: qev050201_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask Zo Langra for more details about his sister.

rows.label: qev050201_JNK0040
rows.name: Question

rows.label: qev050201_SEL0041
rows.name: Ask what kind of enemy this assassin is.

rows.label: qev050201_MSG0015
rows.name:
Since she was a child, Nee-sama was raised
and taught swordplay by our three older brothers.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050201_MSG0016
rows.name:
Thanks to that, she became so strong that an average
warrior couldn't even land a single blow on her...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050201_MSG0017
rows.name: But even so, she is no match for that assassin...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050201_MSG0018
rows.name:
Because—that is the very same opponent who defeated
all three of the brothers who taught her swordplay, fighting together.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050201_MSG0019
rows.name:
Everyone who has laid eyes on that assassin—
including my three brothers—was slaughtered.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050201_MSG0020
rows.name:
So we don't even know what the assassin looks like.
All we know is their fiendish strength, and...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050201_MSG0021
rows.name:
That they are a monster who gleefully slaughters
Larsians as a dog of the Growth.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050201_MSG0022
rows.name:
At this rate, Nee-sama will be brutally murdered
by that assassin before she can achieve her vengeance.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050201_MSG0023
rows.name:
Please, you must restrain my revenge-driven Nee-sama
and bring her back to this city.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050201_MSG0024
rows.name:
I beg of you, proud alien warrior of BLADE!
Please save the life of the last princess
left to the House of Zo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050201_MSG0025
rows.name:
Thank you so much! Though it shames me,
I entrust the fate of the House of Zo to you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050201_MSG0026
rows.name:
Nee-sama heard a rumor that the assassin was spotted
in the Ant Nest in the Valley of Oblivion,
and she headed straight there.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050201_MSG0027
rows.name:
Please, before that fragile life is extinguished...
Find my Nee-sama.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050201_MSG0028
rows.name:
She may look delicate, but Zazhi-neesama
possesses monstrous strength. She could send someone
like me flying with a single hit.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050201_MSG0029
rows.name:
If possible, I would prefer you to bring her back
peacefully, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050201_MSG0030
rows.name:
Depending on the situation, feel free to use some rough
tactics to drag her back to this city.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050201_MSG0031
rows.name:
It hurts me to see Nee-sama injured,
but it is far better than her being killed by that assassin
like our brothers were.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050201_MSG0032
rows.name:
Thank you so much!
Thanks to you, Zazhi-neesama
has returned safely![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050201_MSG0033
rows.name:
Even so, you are incredible, aren't you?
To think you defeated Nee-sama in a head-on clash...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050201_MSG0034
rows.name:
If my brothers were alive, I'm sure they would have
deepened their friendship with you as good friends
and worthy rivals.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050201_JNK0050
rows.name: Agree

rows.label: qev050201_SEL0051
rows.name: Say you would have liked to meet them.

rows.label: qev050201_JNK0060
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev050201_SEL0061
rows.name: Remind him realistically that it is impossible now.

rows.label: qev050201_MSG0035
rows.name:
Hearing you say that must bring joy to my brothers
up in heaven.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050201_MSG0036
rows.name:
I, too, must quickly become a warrior
worthy of their acknowledgment...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050201_MSG0037
rows.name:
You're right... Saying such naive things
is exactly why I can never become a strong warrior...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050201_MSG0038
rows.name:
...From now on, I will change my mindset and dedicate
myself entirely, so that I may become a strong warrior capable of
protecting my sister and fulfilling our vengeance in her stead.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050201_MSG0039
rows.name:
Please, accept this.
It is a humble token of gratitude from the House of Zo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050201_MSG0040
rows.name:
How did it go?!
Did you find Nee-sama...!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050201_MSG0041
rows.name: ...What did you say...?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050201_MSG0042
rows.name:
She stubbornly refused to return
and wouldn't leave the area...?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050201_MSG0043
rows.name:
I see... It seems changing Nee-sama's mind
will not be an easy task.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050201_MSG0044
rows.name:
What must I do to make Nee-sama understand
the feelings of the rest of the House of Zo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050201_MSG0045
rows.name:
Even our brothers, who worried so deeply for her safety,
never wished for such vengeance...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050201_JNK0070
rows.name: Question

rows.label: qev050201_SEL0071
rows.name:
Ask if there is a way to convey
the feelings of their late brothers.

rows.label: qev050201_JNK0080
rows.name: Suggest

rows.label: qev050201_SEL0081
rows.name:
Suggest that subduing her by force
might be the only option.

rows.label: qev050201_MSG0046
rows.name:
When our brothers were teaching her swordplay while they were alive,
they used to say, "This is not a tool to kill your opponents—
it is a sword meant for you to live."[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050201_MSG0047
rows.name:
If she sees the swords our brothers left behind as mementos,
perhaps it will help her remember those words...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050201_MSG0048
rows.name:
I appreciate the advice.
I will take these three swords and head to her side immediately...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050201_MSG0049
rows.name:
Ultimately, that may be unavoidable.
But I want to appeal to her heart one last time...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050201_MSG0050
rows.name:
...That's it! Could I ask you to take these three swords
and head to Nee-sama's side
one more time?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050201_MSG0051
rows.name:
These are the memento swords left by our late brothers.
I'm certain that seeing them will remind her of the words
they always used to say.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050201_MSG0052
rows.name:
"This training is not meant for you to kill your opponents.
Zazhi, it is so that you may live."—That is what they said.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050201_MSG0053
rows.name:
Yes, I'm sure she will understand!
Please, head to Nee-sama's side immediately and...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050201_MSG0054
rows.name: N-Nee-sama! What's wrong?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050201_MSG0055
rows.name:
Langra! I've finally pinpointed their location!
I am going to attempt an infiltration of the Jair Fortress![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050201_MSG0056
rows.name:
Please wait! If we know the location,
we can wait for reinforcements and...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050201_MSG0057
rows.name:
Hah! You mean those Earthlings?
The grudges of the House of Zo will be settled by the House of Zo alone![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050201_MSG0058
rows.name:
That is the Larsian way, isn't it?
Have you forgotten, Zo Langra?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050201_MSG0059
rows.name:
But... that assassin is a formidable enemy who struck down
even our brothers! If you challenge them recklessly, Nee-sama, you will...![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050201_MSG0060
rows.name:
How can one fight while fearing death?!
If you are the heir to the House of Zo, pull yourself together![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050201_MSG0061
rows.name:
I'm off, then!
I swear I will avenge our brothers![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050201_MSG0062
rows.name:
Nee-sama... Our brothers only wanted
one thing: for you to live...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050201_MSG0063
rows.name:
...I am sorry, but please take these swords
and hurry after Nee-sama at once.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050201_MSG0064
rows.name:
Then convey the true intentions of the House of Zo,
and please, save her life![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050201_MSG0065
rows.name:
Those three swords are steeped in the cherished
memories of our late brothers.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050201_MSG0066
rows.name:
I'm sure that if she sees them, Nee-sama will remember
our brothers' words...![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050201_MSG0067
rows.name:
Before she falls by that assassin's hand,
please persuade Nee-sama and save her life![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050201_MSG0068
rows.name:
Ah, Zazhi-neesama has returned to us!
And it is all thanks to you![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050201_MSG0069
rows.name:
It seems that my feelings and the will of our brothers
have still not quite reached her, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050201_MSG0070
rows.name:
I will become as strong as you, who managed to subdue
my enraged sister, and next time, I will protect her.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050201_MSG0071
rows.name:
And someday, I will strike down that assassin with my own hands.
That is the destiny of a man born into the House of Zo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050201_JNK0090
rows.name: Affirm

rows.label: qev050201_SEL0091
rows.name: Support Zo Langra's resolve.

rows.label: qev050201_JNK0100
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev050201_SEL0101
rows.name: Explain to him that vengeance is meaningless.

rows.label: qev050201_MSG0072
rows.name:
Hearing you say that
is extremely reassuring.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050201_MSG0073
rows.name:
I am a weakling who has never landed a single strike
on Nee-sama. I don't know when it will be, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050201_MSG0074
rows.name:
I will dedicate myself to daily training so that I may
defeat that assassin in the Jair Fortress.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050201_MSG0075
rows.name:
But as long as that assassin lives,
Nee-sama will inevitably seek vengeance again.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050201_MSG0076
rows.name:
Furthermore, now that their location is known,
as a man of the House of Zo, I cannot remain silent.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050201_MSG0077
rows.name:
...I know it's impossible for me to do it immediately.
However, I will train every day and eventually fulfill
this duty at the Jair Fortress.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050201_MSG0078
rows.name:
Thank you so much for everything this time.
The House of Zo will never forget this debt of gratitude.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050201_MSG0079
rows.name:
Please, accept this.
It is a humble token of gratitude from our family.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050201_MSG0080
rows.name:
Ah, Zazhi-neesama has returned to us!
And it is all thanks to you![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050201_MSG0081
rows.name:
It seems that my feelings and the will of our brothers
have still not quite reached her, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050201_MSG0082
rows.name:
I will become as strong as you, who managed to subdue
my enraged sister, and next time, I will protect her.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050201_MSG0083
rows.name:
And someday, I will strike down that assassin with my own hands.
That is the destiny of a man born into the House of Zo—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050201_MSG0084
rows.name:
—Eh!?
You mean you've already defeated them?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050201_MSG0085
rows.name: My word... From beginning to end, you've...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050201_MSG0086
rows.name:
Thank you so much, from the bottom of my heart.
The House of Zo will never forget this debt of gratitude.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050201_MSG0087
rows.name:
Please, accept this.
It is a humble token of gratitude from our family.[ST:wait ]
